title: manulea nervosa
intro: Manulea nervosa, also known as the nervous manulea or the Cape manulea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Manulea nervosa include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and other nervous disorders, as well as its use as a treatment for menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. Manulea nervosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
